title: Category Manager
description:
About the Job


The Category Manager is responsible for driving revenue, margin, and product performance for FNP.sg. This role oversees new product launches, pricing, website merchandising, stock health, and major occasion planning to ensure strong commercial outcomes. The individual must be highly analytical, structured, and able to coordinate across multiple teams to deliver a healthy assortment, timely launches, and consistent growth in a fast-paced e-commerce environment.


Job Responsibilities

  • Sales & Profitability:
    Drive and achieve online category sales, gross profit, and income goals by monitoring market trends and developing strategies to grow market share and counter competition.
  • Inventory Management:
    Manage ageing stock, improve stock turnover, and optimise assortment efficiency.
  • Website Merchandising:
    Coordinate with merchandizing and use data to refine website promotional visibility, category sequencing, and pages enhancements
  • Range Review & Assortment Optimization:
    Conduct regular range reviews to ensure the right assortment mix is in place to drive productivity, meet shopper needs, and eliminate underperforming SKUs.
  • Category & Brand Strategy:
    Oversee the implementation of category strategies, including overseeing launch timelines and ensure operational readiness with the product ops team
  • Occasion Leadership
    Develop full occasion strategies including planning, forecasting, and execution.
  • Relationship Management:
    Build and maintain strong relationships with suppliers and internal stakeholders to align on business objectives.
  • Market Insight:
    Stay updated on consumer behavior, market developments, and competitor activities to inform category strategies.
  • Pricing Strategy:
    Develop and implement competitive pricing strategies that offer value to customers while supporting profitability.
  • Reporting & Analysis:
    Prepare weekly/monthly category performance reports with actionable insights and recommendations.

The Ideal Candidate:

  • Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or related field.
  • 4–6 years of relevant experience in retail or Ecommerce or FMCG, preferably in a merchandising or category management role.
  • Excellent analytics, forecasting, and structured problem-solving.
  • Strong knowledge of market dynamics and consumer trends.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office, especially Excel and PowerPoint.
  • Organized and results-driven with a proactive mindset.
  • Team player with the ability to promote cross-functional collaboration.
  • Effective in decision-making and responsive to a fast-changing environment.

postedCompany.description:
For over 25 years, we help customers to celebrate their special moments by delivering fresh flowers and fabulous gifts. Ferns N Petals was established in 1994 and flower bouquet delivery was the first and only thing that the company was into. From just 1 flower shop in 1994, Ferns N Petals is now the largest florist chain with more than 320 stores worldwide. The brand is one stop shop for all gifting needs, be it buying flowers, cakes, plants, personalized gifts, decoration services, or experiences, across the globe.


Why Join us?

We are expanding!  You will be part of a team that will lead the growth of our company. There will be immense oportunity to learn and grow with us. If you are a driven, opportunistic and collaborative individual, come and join us!
postedCompany.name: FERNS N PETALS SGP PTE. LTD.
